title: Tea Ceremony
description: This mod allows you to host a tea ceremony right in your Minecraft world.
body:
# Tea Ceremony
**Tea Ceremony** expands upon vanilla Minecraft mechanics by introducing a brand-new way to enjoy food and drinks.  
It integrates seamlessly with the base game while adding tea bushes, tea leaves, and the ability to brew and drink tea for special effects.

## **[Click here](https://github.com/Hasagj/teaModv01/wiki/Getting-Started-(EN)) for the almost-but-not-quite-complete guide.**

# 🍂Types of tea
- Basic tea (Green and black)
- Perfect tea (also Green and Black)
- Hibiscus tea
- Daisy tea
- Pale tea
- Pitcher tea
- Cactus tea
- Chorus tea
- Ancient tea
- Wanderer's tea
- Crimson tea
- Coral tea
- Sculk tea


Throughout the world, you can also encounter Tea Spirits — mysterious statuettes that play an important role in the tea ceremony. Interacting with them may lead to meaningful and valuable outcomes for the player.

# 🗿 Tea Spirits
- Moon Raven
- The Wise Man
- Pisces

# 🙌 Credits
Developed by **Hasagj**  
Special thanks to the Minecraft modding community for tools and inspiration.
